options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]

options.name: --force
options.description: Force a conversion of projects otherwise considered of an unsupported type (e.g. Entity Framework/ASP.NET).

options.name: --keep-assembly-info
options.description: Keep assembly attributes in AssemblyInfo file instead of moving them to project file.

arguments.name: ITEMS
arguments.description: Project/solution file paths or glob patterns

commands.name: evaluate
commands.description: Examine the projects potential to be converted before actual migration

options.name: --target-frameworks
options.description: Override project target frameworks with ones specified. Specify multiple times for multiple target frameworks.

arguments.name: ITEMS
arguments.description: Project/solution file paths or glob patterns

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Migrate projects to modern Visual Studio CPS format (non-interactive)

options.name: --no-backup
options.description: Skip moving project.json, global.json, and *.xproj to a `Backup` directory after successful migration.

options.name: --force
options.description: Force a conversion of projects otherwise considered of an unsupported type (e.g. Entity Framework/ASP.NET).

options.name: --keep-assembly-info
options.description: Keep assembly attributes in AssemblyInfo file instead of moving them to project file.

options.name: --target-frameworks
options.description: Override project target frameworks with ones specified. Specify multiple times for multiple target frameworks.

options.name: --old-output-path
options.description: Preserve legacy behavior by not creating a subfolder with the target framework in the output path.

options.name: --force-transformations
options.description: Force execution of transformations despite project conversion state by their specified names. Specify multiple times for multiple enforced transformations.

arguments.name: ITEMS
arguments.description: Project/solution file paths or glob patterns

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Do the analysis run and output diagnostics

arguments.name: ITEMS
arguments.description: Project/solution file paths or glob patterns
